response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior developer with strong full-stack, distributed systems, and TDD/craftsmanship background, but the role specifically requires hands-on modern C++ as the primary language. Resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments a decade ago (2014-2015), with no evidence of C++/STL, multi-threading in C++, MQTT, IEC 62443, or industrial automation experience. Core technical fit for this C++/industrial-cybersecurity role is weak despite strong general engineering credentials.
strengths: 10+ years of senior software engineering experience across distributed, low-latency systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and architectural work
Solid Node.js/TypeScript/React background covers the 'advantageous' web stack
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience (2014-2015) and no recent C++/STL work
No demonstrated experience with MQTT, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP3)
No industrial automation, IoT platform, or Azure cloud experience listed

key_factors.factor: Strong senior-level engineering and architecture experience
